sql:
SELECT
'_' AS `no`,
daftar.`tgl surat` AS tanggal,
daftar.`key`,
CASE MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`)
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Januari'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Februari'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Maret'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Mei'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'Juni'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Juli'
    WHEN 8 THEN 'Agustus'
    WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
    WHEN 10 THEN 'Oktober'
    WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
    WHEN 12 THEN 'Desember'
END AS bulan,
CASE
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'Triwulan I'
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 'Triwulan II'
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 'Triwulan III'
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 10 AND 12 THEN 'Triwulan IV'
END AS triwulan,
`user`.fullname AS nama,
`user`.username AS `User/nip`,
CONCAT('Membuat dan mengarsipkan ', jenis_surat.jenis_surat) AS uraian,
daftar.tahun AS tahun,
concat(daftar.rekom_kemenag) as file,
jenis_surat.jenis_surat
FROM daftar
LEFT OUTER JOIN `user` ON daftar.nip_petugas = `user`.username
INNER JOIN jenis_surat ON daftar.pengajuan = jenis_surat.id
WHERE (daftar.`tgl surat` not like "00%%")
ORDER BY daftar.`tgl surat`
name: kinerja

fields.name: bulan
fields.sqlExpression:
CASE MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`)
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Januari'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Februari'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Maret'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'April'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Mei'
    WHEN 6 THEN 'Juni'
    WHEN 7 THEN 'Juli'
    WHEN 8 THEN 'Agustus'
    WHEN 9 THEN 'September'
    WHEN 10 THEN 'Oktober'
    WHEN 11 THEN 'November'
    WHEN 12 THEN 'Desember'
END

fields.name: triwulan
fields.sqlExpression:
CASE
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'Triwulan I'
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 'Triwulan II'
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 'Triwulan III'
    WHEN MONTH(daftar.`tgl surat`) BETWEEN 10 AND 12 THEN 'Triwulan IV'
END
